creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
The text refers to an outdates section of the Handbook (``Miscellaneous
	Devices'') in the FreeBSD FAQ, Question 4.5.4. ``Which multi-port serial
	cards are supported by FreeBSD?''. I think it should be replaced with
	a link to the Handbook chapter ``Serial Communications'', because it is
	about the devices mentioned in the answer.
